summary: The patient’s history of a displaced mandibular fracture combined with tenderness at an old injury site close to the mental foramen strongly indicates a post-trauma complication such as a traumatic neuroma; this contrasts sharply with more chronic conditions like neurofibromas/neuroidiomas which would present differently over time, ruling those alternatives out based solely on current information provided about onset and progression. Therefore, option \( \textbf{\underline{D}} \).

Therefore, option \( \textbf{\underline{D}} \).. Answer choice: D
